name: Cluey Ltd
summary: Cluey Learning Pty Ltd, an education technology company, provides online tutoring services for school students Australia. It offers tutoring services in the areas of English, Maths, and Chemistry for primary, secondary, and senior level students through its online tutoring platform; and test preparation services for NAPLAN (National Assessment Program √Ç¬ñ Literacy and Numeracy) and LANTITE (Literacy and Numeracy Test for Initial Teacher Education) through its test preparation platform. The company also provides tutoring sessions, practice content, feedback, and data analytics. Cluey Learning Pty Ltd was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Sydney, Australia.
